text_raw: Hello!? Is anyone there? If this keeps up, the machines will... Please, someone!
text_clean: Hello!? Is anyone there? If this keeps up, the machines will... Please, someone!

text_raw: You! It's still dangerous here! Get down, quickly!
text_clean: You! It's still dangerous here! Get down, quickly!

text_raw: T-The coachman... where has the coachman gone?
text_clean: T-The coachman... where has the coachman gone?

text_raw: Blast! Are we safe now, or shall more of them spring upon us?
text_clean: Blast! Are we safe now, or shall more of them spring upon us?

text_raw: We can't keep hiding here. We need to get moving.
text_clean: We can't keep hiding here. We need to get moving.

text_raw: I-I must ask a favor. Take this carriage and drive me to Hawkstone Ruins.
text_clean: I-I must ask a favor. Take this carriage and drive me to Hawkstone Ruins.

text_raw: I-I'm no good at the reins, so I'll need to rely on you.
text_clean: I-I'm no good at the reins, so I'll need to rely on you.

text_raw: Let's make haste before they return!
text_clean: Let's make haste before they return!

text_raw: I can still feel my heart pounding.
text_clean: I can still feel my heart pounding.

text_raw: About earlier... I was just waiting for the right moment, that's all.
text_clean: About earlier... I was just waiting for the right moment, that's all.

text_raw: I survived, so that's what matters, isn't it?
text_clean: I survived, so that's what matters, isn't it?

text_raw: I've had my fill of this sort of thing. I'd rather not live through it again.
text_clean: I've had my fill of this sort of thing. I'd rather not live through it again.

text_raw: I truly owe you for today. Thank you.

text_raw: It's alright, you can get up.
